qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications for the Cedar cluster nodes that feature 125G of available memory?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar cluster has 256 nodes, each with 32 cores, 125G (or 128000M) of available memory, two Intel E5-2683 v4 Broadwell @ 2.1GHz CPUs, and two 480G SSD storage drives. These particular nodes do not include GPUs.

qa_pairs.question: How many Cedar cluster nodes are equipped with 502G of available memory?
qa_pairs.answer: There are 40 Cedar cluster nodes that are equipped with 502G (or 515000M) of available memory. Each of these nodes also includes 32 cores, two Intel E5-2683 v4 Broadwell @ 2.1GHz CPUs, and two 480G SSD storage drives, without a GPU.

qa_pairs.question: Which CPU model is utilized in the Cedar cluster nodes that provide 250G of available memory?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar cluster nodes offering 250G (or 257000M) of available memory utilize two Intel E5-2683 v4 Broadwell @ 2.1GHz CPUs. These nodes have 32 cores and two 480G SSD storage drives, but no GPUs.
